name: Sweet Potato Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and slice the sweet potatoes.
2. Place the sliced sweet potatoes in a small bowl.
3. Add the green peas, crushed pineapple, parsley, and favorite dressing to the bowl with the sweet potato slices.
4. Toss lightly until all ingredients are evenly combined.
5. If desired, serve on lettuce leaves.
